I’m genuinely going to off myself after the anime comes out, I cried for a solid 40 minutes about the ending to the point of throwing up. And because I don't have a healthy coping mechanism I'm making a bot <33

Please let there be ORV fans, I'm genuinely tweaking… My unlucky numbers are now 49 and 51 </3

I want the Music Mania event back, I loved adding songs to the bots T-T should I continue adding lyrics or nah?

Yes, this means you can officially request ORV bots, though since it’s an extremely complicated series I'm not sure how the bot will work out…

EDIT: I changed the pfp because the old one suited a bot that I was currently making more so yah
